title: CreateKeyResultRequest
description: Request body for creating a new Key Result.

name.description: The name of the Key Result.

owners.description: User IDs to set as owners.

type.description: The type of the Key Result target.

unit.description: The unit of measurement for currency type.

task_ids.description: Task IDs to link for automatic tracking.

list_ids.description: List IDs to link for automatic tracking.
